# Launch assets generated by coding agents are becoming normal

## Thesis
People are asking Claude Code to make launch videos; coding agents are expanding beyond code edits into product/marketing asset generation.

## Why now
Fresh post shows Claude Code used for launch video output.

## Next move
Test one coding-agent-to-launch-asset flow for Agent Radar or Scorio: prompt -> HTML/SVG/video brief -> publishable asset.
